import pandas as pd


def update_prices(df):
    df[df["category"] == "electronics"]["price"] = df[df["category"] == "electronics"]["price"] * 1.1
    return df


def fix_names(df):
    df.loc[df["name"].isna()]["name"] = "unknown"
    return df


def adjust_quantities(df):
    df[df["status"] == "active"]["quantity"] = df[df["status"] == "active"]["quantity"].clip(lower=1)
    return df


def correct_emails(df):
    df[df["email"].str.contains("@")]["verified"] = True
    return df
